new_value: {"notes":"Enhanced SX1262.cs: fixed RX one-shot vs continuous using rxOneShot flag (only exit RX on packet for one-shot), added lock to FinishTransmission for CS deassert/easyDMA safety on nRF52840 SPIM, fixed opcode comment, improved buffer/IRQ state handling under lock.
